G

get(int) - Method in class edu.ncsu.csc316.dsa.list.ArrayBasedList
Returns the element at the specified index of the list
get(int) - Method in interface edu.ncsu.csc316.dsa.list.List
Returns the element at the specified index of the list
get(int) - Method in class edu.ncsu.csc316.dsa.list.SinglyLinkedList
Returns the element at the specified index of the list
get(K) - Method in interface edu.ncsu.csc316.dsa.map.Map
Returns the value that is associated with the given key
get(K) - Method in class edu.ncsu.csc316.dsa.map.SearchTableMap
gets the value of the key
get(K) - Method in class edu.ncsu.csc316.dsa.map.SkipListMap
gets the value at the key
get(K) - Method in class edu.ncsu.csc316.dsa.map.UnorderedLinkedMap
The code for this method is based on the get algorithm on page 407 in the course textbook "Data Structures and Algorithms" by Goodrich, Tamassia, Goldwasser.
getCreditHours() - Method in class edu.ncsu.csc316.dsa.data.Student
gets the credit hours of the student
getElement() - Method in interface edu.ncsu.csc316.dsa.Position
Return the element stored at this position

returns the first name of the student object

gets the student's GPA
getId() - Method in interface edu.ncsu.csc316.dsa.data.Identifiable
gets the id of the student
getId() - Method in class edu.ncsu.csc316.dsa.data.Student
gets the id of the student object
getKey() - Method in interface edu.ncsu.csc316.dsa.map.Map.Entry
Return the key of the entry
getLast() - Method in class edu.ncsu.csc316.dsa.data.Student
gets the last name of the student object

Returns the left child of the current node

Returns the parent of the current node
getRight() - Method in class edu.ncsu.csc316.dsa.tree.LinkedBinaryTree.BinaryTreeNode
Returns the right child of the current node
